revision.text: {| class="wikitable" style="table-layout:fixed; width:100%; font-size:90%;" |+ '''Today:''' {{GaiadDate}} |- ! style="width:12%;" | {{v|t|e|template=Gaian_calendar}} ! colspan="28" | [[Gaian calendar]] |- ! style="width:12%;" | Days | style="width:3%;" | Mon || style="width:3%;" | Tue || style="width:3%;" | Wed || style="width:3%;" | Thu || style="width:3%;" | Fri || style="width:3%;" | Sat || style="width:3%; background:#ffd700;" | Sun | style="width:3%;" | Mon || style="width:3%;" | Tue || style="width:3%;" | Wed || style="width:3%;" | Thu || style="width:3%;" | Fri || style="width:3%;" | Sat || style="width:3%; background:#ffd700;" | Sun | style="width:3%;" | Mon || style="width:3%;" | Tue || style="width:3%;" | Wed || style="width:3%;" | Thu || style="width:3%;" | Fri || style="width:3%;" | Sat || style="width:3%; background:#ffd700;" | Sun | style="width:3%;" | Mon || style="width:3%;" | Tue || style="width:3%;" | Wed || style="width:3%;" | Thu || style="width:3%;" | Fri || style="width:3%;" | Sat || style="width:3%; background:#ffd700;" | Sun |- !
